meaning: adj.卑鄙的,可耻的,恶劣的,可憎的,简陋的,低廉的,坏透的,不足道的
examples: A vile smell assailed my nostrils.
He was in a vile mood.
But is it possible to do so without the vile histrionics and the over-the-top drama?
Hitchings sometimes casts himself as Candide, viewing with dismay the vile underbelly of the linguistic world.
